name: Scottish Meat Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the lean ground beef, beaten egg, flour, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add the minced onion and mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Stir in the vegetable oil and chicken broth.
5. Pour in the crushed pineapple and stir to combine.
6. Form the mixture into meat balls of equal size.
7. Place the meat balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the meatballs are cooked through and browned on the outside.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
